title: stelis fissurata
intro: Stelis fissurata is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stelis fissurata include its potential to treat skin conditions, wounds, and infections, as well as its ability to alleviate fever and cough. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
